features: Soft & Gentle for all of your beauty needs
description: Product Description Durable & versatile, high quality square shaped cotton wool pads idea for gentle cleansing and make-up removal Ingredients Cotton Wool Directions To use, moisten the pad with water or your favorite cleaning product and gently rub it into your skin to remove makeup or dirt. Do not throw the pads into the toilet. Dispose of them in a suitable garbage bin after use. Safety Warning Do not swallow, keep out of reach of small children & babies See more
